title: Dozens killed as Israeli special forces raid Lebanese village in search of 40-year-old remains
summary_full: Overnight, one Israeli operation saw at least 41 people killed and 40 injured, according to the Lebanese health ministry.
summary_public: Overnight, one Israeli operation saw at least 41 people killed and 40 injured, according to the Lebanese health ministry.
